# backtest_assets

This folder contains runtime reference artifacts generated by the MTC data pipeline.
**Do NOT hand-edit these files** — they are generated by the CLI tools below.

| File | Generator |
|------|-----------|
| `data_catalog.json` | `mtc_backtest/data_tools/download_cli.py` |
| `validation_report.md` | `mtc_backtest/data_tools/validate.py` |
| `regime_calendar_4h.json` | `mtc_backtest/regimes/regime_cli.py` |
| `regime_calendar_4h.md` | `mtc_backtest/regimes/regime_cli.py` |

## Quick-start commands

```bash
# 1. Download BTCUSDT data (all timeframes, 2018-07-01 → today)
#    Run from the repo root (C:\LAB\tradingview-lab)
python mtc_backtest/data_tools/download_cli.py \
    --provider binance --symbol BTCUSDT \
    --start 2018-07-01 \
    --timeframes 5m,15m,1h,2h,4h,1d \
    --chunk_days 30

# 2. Validate
python mtc_backtest/data_tools/validate.py

# 3. Generate 4H regime calendar
python mtc_backtest/regimes/regime_cli.py \
    --data 110_/data/processed/binance/BTCUSDT/4h.parquet

# 4. Run backtest restricted to bull regime
cd mtc_backtest
python scripts/run_case.py parity_suite_350/cases/parity_core_001_mode_v01.json \
    --regime bull
```
